---
title: "Applegreen Consumer Behaviour Project"
description: "Market research study focused on customer needs, preferences, and purchasing behaviour."
author: "Esha Esha"
date: "2026-04-22"
image: ../../images/applegreen.jpg
categories: [Business, Marketing, Research]
---

# Project Overview

This university project analysed customer behaviour for Applegreen to understand consumer expectations and service improvement opportunities.

## Key Contributions

- Conducted customer interviews  
- Studied buying patterns  
- Analysed customer priorities  
- Presented recommendations  

## Research Focus

- Price sensitivity  
- Service speed  
- Product choice  
- Customer experience  

## Python Insight

```{python}
#| echo: false

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

labels = ["Price", "Speed", "Choice", "Service"]
values = [30, 25, 20, 25]

plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
plt.bar(labels, values)
plt.title("Top Purchase Drivers")
plt.ylabel("Importance (%)")
plt.xlabel("Factors")
plt.show()
```

## Learning Outcome

The project improved my understanding of how customer data can guide retail growth and loyalty strategies.
